modeChangeConditions.toNormal: CONDITIONS MET — all critical blockers resolved, risk score 8 (NORMAL). Recommend mode change from 'conservative' to 'normal'. Human approval advised.
modeChangeConditions.toElevated: New high-severity security issue without PR, main CI failure rate >20%, or merge conflict rate >25%.
modeChangeConditions.toCritical: New security regression on main, main CI failure rate >30%, or 2+ unresolved critical issues without PRs.
